name: Apple Tarts
recipeIngredient: 1 sheet (1/2 pound) frozen puff pastry, thawed
1 tablespoon cold unsalted butter, cut into bits
2 tablespoons apricot jam, heated and strained
Vanilla ice cream or whipped cream for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry on a lightly floured surface to an 1/8 inch thickness.
2. Cut out two 7-inch rounds and transfer them to a baking sheet.
3. Peel, halve lengthwise, and core the apple. Slice it thinly crosswise.
4. Arrange the slices, overlapping slightly, on the pastry rounds.
5. In a small bowl, stir together the sugar and cinnamon. Sprinkle evenly over the apples.
6. Dot the tarts with butter.
7. Bake in a pre-heated 400°F (200°C) oven for 25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
8. Transfer to a rack and brush with jam.
9. Serve warm with ice cream or whipped cream.
Yield: 2 servings
